title: Gettin' Ziggy With It On The Pi Zero
summary: import Aside from "../../components/Aside.astro"; Alright, you can read the article first and shoot me later for a title like that, and what will inevitably become a series of Zig based puns. Zig, for the unaware, is a fancy language that looks to be to C what Rust is to C++. Hon
